docs.text: SuperBroke Guide Welcome to the SuperBroke documentation. Quick Start Open the petition form in the main app. Complete each required section in the filing checklist. Verify progress reaches Ready to File! Prepare your filing packet. Build These Docs Install MkDocs and run the local docs server: pip install mkdocs mkdocs serve By default, the guide will be available at http://127.0.0.1:8000/ .
docs.title: Guide
